Description: CIC-IDS2017 CSV flow records were used.
Each daily CSV was sampled to 50,000 rows where available, producing approximately 400,000 flows.
Non-numeric fields were removed before model training.
Missing and infinite values were replaced before model fitting.
Numeric features were clipped at the 0.1st and 99.9th percentiles.
An 80/20 stratified train-test split was used with random_state=42.
